# Telepact

> Telepact is a JSON-first RPC framework with Markdown documentation, examples,
> and developer references in this repository.

Use these Markdown files as the primary source material for repository context.

## Core

- [Overview](README.md): Project introduction and top-level docs entry point.
- [Contributing](CONTRIBUTING.md): Monorepo workflow, build, and test guidance.
- [Documentation Home](doc/index.md): Main documentation map.
- [Full-Stack Example](doc/example.md): End-to-end walkthrough.

## Development

- [Libraries](lib/README.md): Cross-language library coordination guidance.
- [Runner Tests](test/runner/README.md): How the integration test runner is organized.
- [Project CLI](tool/telepact_project_cli/README.md): Internal tooling used in the repo.

## Libraries

- [TypeScript Library](lib/ts/README.md): TypeScript runtime usage.
- [Python Library](lib/py/README.md): Python runtime usage.
- [Java Library](lib/java/README.md): Java runtime usage.
- [Go Library](lib/go/README.md): Go runtime usage.

## SDKs

- [CLI](sdk/cli/README.md): Telepact command-line interface.
- [Console](sdk/console/README.md): Browser-based Telepact console.
- [Prettier Plugin](sdk/prettier/README.md): Telepact formatting support.

## Examples

- [Demos](example/README.md): Runnable end-to-end examples.
